Name: Func.refGene
Description: Functional category of the variant relative to known genes (e.g. exonic intronic UTR5 UTR3 splicing intergenic)

Name: GeneDetail.refGene
Description: Detailed annotation for non-exonic variants (e.g. distance to gene or splicing notation)

Name: ExonicFunc.refGene
Description: Functional consequence for exonic variants (e.g. nonsynonymous SNV synonymous SNV frameshift)

Name: AAChange.refGene
Description: Amino acid change annotation in format Gene:Transcript:Exon:cDNA:Protein

Name: Func.refGeneWithVer
Description: Functional category of the variant relative to known genes (with transcript version)

Name: Gene.refGeneWithVer
Description: Gene name from RefSeq annotation (with transcript version)

Name: GeneDetail.refGeneWithVer
Description: Detailed annotation for non-exonic variants (with transcript version)

Name: ExonicFunc.refGeneWithVer
Description: Functional consequence for exonic variants (with transcript version)

Name: AAChange.refGeneWithVer
Description: Amino acid change annotation with versioned transcripts

Name: Func.ensGene
Description: Functional category using Ensembl gene annotation

Name: Func.knownGene
Description: Functional category using UCSC Known Gene annotation

Name: Gene.knownGene
Description: Gene name from UCSC Known Gene annotation
